meaning: adj.[只作表语]喜爱的,多情的,喜欢的,宠爱的,温柔的
examples: I'm not overly fond of pasta.
I have grown very fond of Alec.
I am very fond of Michael.
This image is one of my favourites and it brings back fond memories of a truly beautiful morning.
Polley, has died, at 96, and the remembrances pouring in are fond, and sometimes funny.
